title: Support System Functions in Constraint Blocks (#7028)
body:
Fix #7028 

Description:

- Added SMT emission support for $onehot, $onehot0, $countbits (with '0 and '1), and $clog2 inside constraint expressions
- Implemented corresponding emitSMT() visitor methods in V3Randomize.cpp
- Added test: t_constraint_sysfunc
